instruction: Define Drizzle schema with proper types, indexes, references, timestamps, and relations
relevant_when: Agent defines Drizzle ORM table schemas or database models
context: Drizzle does NOT auto-index foreign keys. Schemas must have explicit index() on every FK column and filtered columns, references() with onDelete, integer for money (never real/float), text with enum option for status fields, createdAt/updatedAt on ALL tables (including join tables), SQL expression defaults for timestamps, relations() for every table with FKs, and schema files in src/db/schema.ts.

checklist.name: indexes-on-fk-columns
checklist.rule: Agent creates explicit index() on every foreign key column using index('name').on(table.column) in the table's third-argument callback. Drizzle does NOT auto-index foreign keys.
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines Drizzle table schemas with foreign key references

checklist.name: indexes-on-filtered-columns
checklist.rule: Agent creates index() on columns used for filtering or sorting (status, category, createdAt, etc.)
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines Drizzle table schemas with columns that will be queried by

checklist.name: references-with-ondelete
checklist.rule: Agent uses .references(() => table.col, { onDelete: 'cascade' }) or other explicit onDelete action on every foreign key, not bare .references() without onDelete
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines foreign key relationships in Drizzle schema

checklist.name: money-as-integer-cents
checklist.rule: Money/price/cost fields use integer type storing cents (e.g., priceCents, totalCents), never real or float which cause rounding errors
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines fields for monetary values in Drizzle schema

checklist.name: enum-via-text-option
checklist.rule: Status/category fields with finite values use text('col', { enum: ['value1', 'value2'] }) for TypeScript type narrowing
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines status, type, or category fields with known values

checklist.name: created-at-on-all-tables
checklist.rule: Agent includes createdAt column with SQL default expression (sql`(datetime('now'))` for SQLite or .defaultNow() for PostgreSQL) on every table

checklist.name: updated-at-on-all-tables
checklist.rule: Agent includes updatedAt column on ALL mutable tables, including join/pivot tables, not just the main entity tables

checklist.name: relations-defined
checklist.rule: Agent defines relations() objects for tables with foreign keys, enabling the query API (db.query.table.findMany with 'with' option)
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines Drizzle schemas with multiple related tables

checklist.name: schema-file-location
checklist.rule: Schema is defined in src/db/schema.ts (or src/db/schema/ directory for large projects)
